title: Introducing the 2-Way Synced Timeline! 📅✨

posts.author: MariaM (Maria)
posts.cookedHtml:
Visualize any project or process timeline in a beautiful, dynamic way, using existing data from boards without the need for manual changes.

Our newest element takes integration with monday to the next level - A synced timeline template dynamically connects to your monday.com board, reflecting changes made on either platform in real-time.

How it works:

  1. Choose the “Timeline” template in the template center.
  2. Select a monday board that contains a Date Column.
  3. Check the “Live sync” box, and place it on your canvas.

want a timeline based on a snapshotof your monday board?
Simply keep the “live sync” box unchecked. This way, changes made in the canvas timeline would not affect the board date column (one time data pull).

Check out the demo video, explore the KB article full feature, try it yourself, and let us know what you think!
